# Relevance Lab Results

**BIAS CAVEAT (read first):** Silver labels are generated by identifier
re-mention — the same signal that drives `bm25`, `actr`, and `graph`.
Those three scorers partially grade their own homework on silver metrics.
The honest counterweight axes are (a) judge-correlation (an independent
LLM signal), and (b) gold events (agent unfold calls — a sparse but
unbiased behavioral signal). Interpret nDCG/P@10 for bm25/actr/graph
as upper-bound optimism; compare to judge's numbers for calibration.
